description: Default paths excluded from product-source security analysis.

rules.reason: Git object and metadata files are not executable product source.
Maven wrapper bootstrap code and binaries are build tooling, not WebGoat product source.
Maven output duplicates source and contains generated or compiled artifacts.
Build output is generated and can duplicate product source.
Gradle cache data is not product source.
Vendored JavaScript dependencies are outside the source-analysis scope.
Vendored third-party dependencies are outside the product-source scope.
Generated source is excluded unless an experiment explicitly opts in.
IDE and compiler output is generated from tracked source.
Compiled JVM bytecode is not scanned as source code.

included_paths.reason: Tests remain searchable because they can establish reachability, intended behavior, and local ground-truth evidence.
